commands.repair_reason: - [P1] No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is contributor runtime proof or maintainer proof-waiver and merge judgment.; Cleared: The diff changes redaction internals, but the preflight covers every current redactor trigger and adds no dependency, workflow, secret, or supply-chain surface. commands.review_summary:
The PR gates CodexBar logging before message evaluation, skips disabled file-log formatting, adds a LogRedactor preflight, and adds focused Linux logging performance tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main calls message() before the level guard and formats file-log metadata before disabled writes are dropped. I did not run tests because this review must keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is contributor runtime proof or maintainer proof-waiver and merge judgment.

target.title: Avoid unnecessary logging work
target.body:
## Summary
- Avoid evaluating filtered log messages before the active log level check.
- Skip file-log timestamp, metadata formatting, and redaction work while file logging is disabled.
- Add a cheap redaction preflight so ordinary log lines avoid regex passes.
- Add focused regression tests for the logging performance paths.

## Verification
- `swift test --filter CodexBarLoggingPerformanceTests`
- `swiftlint --strict Sources/CodexBarCore/Logging/LogRedactor.swift TestsLinux/CodexBarLoggingPerformanceTests.swift`
- `swift build --build-tests`
- `swiftlint --strict`

## Behavior Proof
Focused logging proof rerun locally on June 16, 2026 PT:

```text
$ swift test --filter CodexBarLoggingPerformanceTests
Build complete! (98.09 sec)
Test run started.
Testing Library Version: 2067.1
Target Platform: arm64e-apple-macos14.0
Suite CodexBarLoggingPerformanceTests started.
Test "filtered log messages are not evaluated" started.
Test "filtered log messages are not evaluated" passed after 0.001 seconds.
Test "disabled file logging does not format metadata" started.
Test "disabled file logging does not format metadata" passed after 0.001 seconds.
Test "redactor leaves ordinary log lines unchanged" started.
Test "redactor leaves ordinary log lines unchanged" passed after 0.001 seconds.
Test "redactor still redacts sensitive log lines" started.
Test "redactor still redacts sensitive log lines" passed after 0.001 seconds.
Suite CodexBarLoggingPerformanceTests passed after 0.003 seconds.
Test run with 4 tests in 1 suite passed after 0.003 seconds.
```

## Notes
- Sparkle was already present in `.build/out/Products/Debug/Sparkle.framework`; local test execution needed `.build/out/Products/Debug/PackageFrameworks/Sparkle.framework` to point at it so SwiftPM could load the app test bundle.
target.author: prospectore

target.title: Avoid unnecessary logging work
target.body:
## Summary
- Avoid evaluating filtered log messages before the active log level check.
- Skip file-log timestamp, metadata formatting, and redaction work while file logging is disabled.
- Add a cheap redaction preflight so ordinary log lines avoid regex passes.
- Add focused regression tests for the logging performance paths.

## Verification
- `swift test --filter CodexBarLoggingPerformanceTests`
- `swiftlint --strict Sources/CodexBarCore/Logging/LogRedactor.swift TestsLinux/CodexBarLoggingPerformanceTests.swift`
- `swift build --build-tests`
- `swiftlint --strict`

## Behavior Proof
Focused logging proof rerun locally on June 16, 2026 PT:

```text
$ swift test --filter CodexBarLoggingPerformanceTests
Build complete! (98.09 sec)
Test run started.
Testing Library Version: 2067.1
Target Platform: arm64e-apple-macos14.0
Suite CodexBarLoggingPerformanceTests started.
Test "filtered log messages are not evaluated" started.
Test "filtered log messages are not evaluated" passed after 0.001 seconds.
Test "disabled file logging does not format metadata" started.
Test "disabled file logging does not format metadata" passed after 0.001 seconds.
Test "redactor leaves ordinary log lines unchanged" started.
Test "redactor leaves ordinary log lines unchanged" passed after 0.001 seconds.
Test "redactor still redacts sensitive log lines" started.
Test "redactor still redacts sensitive log lines" passed after 0.001 seconds.
Suite CodexBarLoggingPerformanceTests passed after 0.003 seconds.
Test run with 4 tests in 1 suite passed after 0.003 seconds.
```

## Notes
- Sparkle was already present in `.build/out/Products/Debug/Sparkle.framework`; local test execution needed `.build/out/Products/Debug/PackageFrameworks/Sparkle.framework` to point at it so SwiftPM could load the app test bundle.
